summary: Verified bug fix for 'Try Different Mode' showing all allowed game types. The fix is working correctly - all 3 modes (Quiz, Fill Blank, True/False) are displayed after clicking 'Try Different Mode' in an ALL_MODES session.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIX VERIFIED: originalAllowedModes state (line 767) correctly saves allowed modes from initial session load
BUG FIX VERIFIED: fetchSession (lines 851-866) saves originalAllowedModes from both session.allowed_game_types and assignment.allowed_game_types
BUG FIX VERIFIED: Mode selection UI (lines 1428-1430) uses correct priority: originalAllowedModes > assignment > session > default
BUG FIX VERIFIED: tryDifferentMode (lines 1238-1257) correctly shows mode selection with all allowed modes
Console logs confirm: [ModeSelection] originalAllowedModes: [quiz, fill_blank, true_false] and availableModes: [quiz, true_false, fill_blank]
seed_data_creation: Created test assignment pa_ee7c63d6781a4197 with allowed_game_types: [quiz, fill_blank, true_false] and session ps_77a68fd85f2a4a84
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix for 'Try Different Mode' is fully verified. Key test flow: (1) Create ALL_MODES session with allowed_game_types: [quiz, fill_blank, true_false], (2) Join session and verify initial mode selection shows all 3 modes, (3) Select Quiz mode and complete game, (4) Click 'Try Different Mode', (5) Verify all 3 modes are shown again (Classic Quiz is disabled since it was just played). The originalAllowedModes state correctly preserves the allowed modes from initial session load.

initial_mode_selection.evidence: Screenshot shows all 3 modes on initial load

quiz_completion.description: Quiz completed successfully with 3 questions answered
quiz_completion.evidence: Screenshot shows completion screen with 0/3 score and 'Try Different Mode' button

try_different_mode_button.evidence: Console log shows mode selection triggered

post_game_mode_selection.evidence: Screenshot shows all 3 modes after clicking 'Try Different Mode', with Classic Quiz disabled (already played)

originalAllowedModes_state.description: State correctly preserves allowed modes from initial session load
originalAllowedModes_state.evidence: Console logs show: [ModeSelection] originalAllowedModes: [quiz, fill_blank, true_false]
